tasks.user_task: Run a retained UNS document flow and confirm artifacts appear.
tasks.expected_output: filesystem delivery artifacts plus run_meta.json and usage_record.json
tasks.user_visible_success_signal: user can see output artifacts land in the bounded output path

tasks.user_task: Run a retained IT source flow and confirm bounded cursor-linked output.
tasks.expected_output: bounded output artifacts with IT usage/source linkage
tasks.user_visible_success_signal: user can tell a structured source completed and output landed
failure_observation_checklist: output landed but source linkage missing

tasks.user_task: Trigger or select a retained failure and follow its bounded recovery path.
tasks.expected_recovery_path: failure classification -> replay or requeue -> verify/governance receipt
tasks.user_visible_success_failure_signal: user can tell whether failure stayed visible and whether recovery completed

tasks.user_task: Run a retained fanout path and inspect child plus aggregate outputs.
tasks.destinations: retained multi-sink composition path with filesystem-visible child output
tasks.expected_aggregate_child_outputs: aggregate/shared-summary plus child outputs with all-ok vs partial-failure separation
tasks.user_visible_success_failure_signal: user can tell whether fanout fully succeeded or partially failed
scope_mixing_checklist: shared summary visible when failed children agree
fanout not interpreted as sink connector

tasks.user_task: Discover the retained truth package through helper/report and bundle surfaces.
tasks.expected_bundle_helper_report_discovery: user can discover S5/S6/S7/S8 truth surfaces from canonical helper/report entrypoints
failure_observation_checklist: truth surface only discoverable from source code
bundle implies installer or deployment readiness

feedback_classification_rule: User feedback must be classified into P5 blocker, M5 closeout fix, P5 final user validation feedback, P6 product-shell-later issue, or out-of-scope cloud/commercial request.
